product_results.title: Telaso for iPhone 16 Pro Case, iPhone 16 Pro Phone Case Compatible with Magsafe Translucent Matte Back Slim Fit Full Body Shockproof Anti-Yellow Cover for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3", Desert Titanium

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be a decent quality option that fits amazingly well. The case looks great and appears exactly like the picture shown. Users appreciate the nice color, noting that the color does not degrade over time. The case provides good protection for the phone. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding staining and durability aspects of the product.

authors_reviews.title: Bonne qualité
authors_reviews.text: L’article est de bonne qualitéJe l’ai acheté il y a date et jusqu’à maintenant il est résistantIl protège bien le téléphoneLa couleur ne se dégrade pas
authors_reviews.author: Anne Sainfleur

authors_reviews.title: The perfect case!
authors_reviews.text: I love this case, it’s probably the nicest one I’ve ever had. I drop my phone constantly and it’s protected it well. It still looks nearly brand new after months of use. The buttons click so nicely and haven’t lost any colour.I’ve had so many cases where the colour starts to peel or fade. Not this one! Buy this case!
authors_reviews.author: Sara

authors_reviews.title: Great case
authors_reviews.text: Love this case. So sturdy! I’ve had it on my phone for 6 months and still looks brand new. It’s also such a nice color.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: It saved my brand new iPhone 16 Pro
authors_reviews.text: I accidently dropped my phone and a car ran over it (not even kidding). The case got a few scratches but my phone had zero damage whatsoever. 5*****
authors_reviews.author: Gento

authors_reviews.title: Cool color, offers decent protection
authors_reviews.text: Overall decent case for my iPhone, looks cool with the silver from the phone and the tanish color of the case.Seems like it offers decent protection.
authors_reviews.author: Mike

authors_reviews.title: Camera ring loose
authors_reviews.text: The product looks great and fits well. The only problem with it is that the ring around the camera support is loose and rattles. Otherwise an okay product. They have one without the camera ring though so I suggest going with that one instead.
authors_reviews.author: Kim
